title: Global Reforestation Tracker Update — Apr 21, 2026
summary: An NPR investigation found only 13% of $19 billion pledged for the Great Green Wall has been disbursed, exposing a critical financing gap as the 2030 deadline approaches. The REMAR project launched in the Eastern Caribbean with €5.5 million to restore mangroves across five territories under a community-centred, hydrological-first approach. India's Odisha state reported a 16.6% decade-long growth in mangrove cover, with the Bhitarkanika 'fishbone channel' restoration model gaining international recognition. Earth Day 2026, themed 'Our Power, Our Planet,' is mobilizing 10,000+ global events including a Guinness World Record tree-planting attempt in Kenya.

summary: REMAR Project Launched: €5.5M to Restore Eastern Caribbean Mangroves. NPR Investigation: Great Green Wall Only 13% of $19B Pledged Disbursed.
